title: BEM-867 inspect runner order
objective:
Run script:
"""
runner = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
lines = runner.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore').splitlines() if runner.exists() else []
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem867_runner_order')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
for i, line in enumerate(lines, 1):
    if line.lstrip().startswith('- name:') or 'process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' in line or 'BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR' in line or 'Job summary' in line or 'Commit' in line:
        safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in line.strip())[:120] or 'blank'
        marker = outdir / (str(i).zfill(4) + '_' + safe + '.md')
        marker.write_text('# BEM-867 runner order line\nLine: ' + str(i) + '\nText: ' + line + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(marker))
        count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_RUNNER_ORDER_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-867 runner order index\nCount: ' + str(count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('BEM867 runner order inspected: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
